description_long: This is a pair of open-toe slip-on sandals featuring a wide, textured mauve leather strap across the front and a flat, tan sole. The upper strap is made from a pebbled leather material, providing a soft yet durable appearance. The insole is smooth and lightly contoured, with subtle embossed branding visible on the heel area. The outsole is thin and flat, likely made from a flexible material for comfort and easy movement. The sandals have no visible fasteners, laces, or buckles, emphasizing a minimalist and casual design. These shoes are suitable for warm weather and urban environments, offering both style and practicality.
description: A pair of mauve leather slip-on sandals with wide front straps and flat tan soles, featuring a minimalist and casual design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-toe design and wide mauve leather straps across the top.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the flat tan sole and the thickness of the leather strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, tan insole with embossed branding and the open heel.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle emphasizing the flatness of the sole and the texture of the upper strap.
